svg.text: iptables: OUTPUT DROP · NAT all TCP --> envoy:3128
Allow UDP entries --> direct via iptables (CLAUDIUS_ALLOW)
bash shell on exit · no NET_ADMIN · no setuid (SUDO=0)
opt: SSH socket · GPG socket · Wayland / X11 clipboard
Lua filter: allowlist check on every request
config built at start from envoy.yaml.tpl
